title: centaurium chilense var. humile
intro: Centaurium chilense var. humile, also known as Yellow Centaury, is a perennial plant that belongs to the gentian family and is native to the Andes mountains in South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Centaurium chilense var. humile include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and skin problems.
